description: Prepare for the upcoming school year with our informative newsletter, specially curated with essential education resources for parents. This invaluable guide provides insights into enrichment activities to augment your child's learning journey. It also elaborates on school rules to ensure your child's safety and discipline. Our newsletter also includes an extensive list of school supplies that your child will need for the academic year, making your shopping easier. We even incorporate teacher wish lists to help you understand your child's educators' needs better. This comprehensive guide is an essential tool for parents navigating the back-to-school season. Stay informed and ready for a successful school year with our education-focused newsletter.
short_description: Prepare for back-to-school with our newsletter. Discover enrichment activities, understand school rules, find the essential school supplies list, and explore teacher wish lists. An essential education resource for parents.

designer.description: I am a graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and photography. Currently working freelance and open for new work!

html_data:
SCHOOL IS BACK

Get ready to start!

Although many people like to set resolutions and try turning over a new leaf around the New Year, March is also a great time for a healthy focus, after the long winter is almost over. Get on track with our meals!

All you need for school

Restock on school supplies!

Pencils, pens, notebooks, art supplies, and everything you need to enjoy and make the most at school. Here's the list of our favorite shops!

Shop for Supplies
 

The best backpacks for the best students!

We all need a new backpack after doing our best this past years. Fashionable and sturdy, here are our backpack recommendations!

Read Recommendations
 
 

Check our dress code and prep your outfit!

We encourage self expression via fashion! Refresh your outfits and impress your friends this year! 

Read Dress Code

Fun activities this month!

DANCE CLASS

Get the body moving with friends! Here are our top dance schools in the area

See List

ART EXPLORATION

For our creative students, our best selection of art classes, schools and workshops.

See List

OUTDOORS ADVENTURES

Activities to enjoy outdoors when we are not studying, for the wild spirits in our school

See Activities

FAMILY CLASSES

Get some quality family time after school and work with our selected workshops

See Workshops

Have any questions before starting? We are happy to help at 000-0000 or via email

Contact us
 

Stay up-to-date with current activities and future events by following us on your favorite social media channels.

Changed your mind? Unsubscribe
